footer.hours: Open Wednesday to Sunday — dinner service only.

hero.subtitle: Seasonal bistronomic cuisine in Québec City, rebuilt each week around the growers of the moment. Twenty seats. One menu. The rhythm of what's alive.
hero.image_alt: Editorial still life: sourdough loaves fresh from the oven, farmhouse butter and a bread knife set on an écru linen cloth — La Table de Marguerite terroir composition
hero.image_caption: Terroir still life — sourdough and farmhouse butter

chefStory.title: From farm to table, the shortest road.
chefStory.image_alt: Portrait of Marguerite Lefebvre, chef-owner of La Table de Marguerite, standing in front of a rack of dried herbs in her kitchen, warm natural light
chefStory.p1: Marguerite opened her table in 2019, after a five-year apprenticeship between Copenhagen and Charlevoix. The idea fit on a single line: cook only what people she knows have grown, fished or raised that week.
chefStory.p2: The menu changes every Thursday. It starts with a phone call to Étienne Côté, a market gardener in Saint-Apollinaire, a returning fisher in Saint-Siméon, or a walk in the woods behind her parents' farm. Every dish is a portrait of a producer, signed on a plate.
chefStory.p3_quote: "We don't cook products. We cook people."

menu.title: Nine dishes, three chapters, one season.
menu.subtitle: The menu reads like a terroir notebook: each dish signs a Québec producer. Photos are updated every Thursday, following the deliveries. Wine pairings available.

categories_tag.plats: at the centre of the table

categories_aria.plats: Main courses from the seasonal menu

menu.footer_note: Allergens are communicated at service. Please flag dietary restrictions at reservation — the kitchen adapts, within the limits of each week's harvest.

tartare-bison.name: Bison tartare, capers, hazelnut oil
tartare-bison.description: Charlevoix-raised bison, North Shore capers, hazelnut oil roasted in-house.
tartare-bison.alt: Vertical photograph of a hand-cut bison tartare garnished with capers and hazelnuts, served on an ivory handcrafted ceramic plate

beets-chevre.name: Roasted beets, fresh goat cheese, spruce syrup
beets-chevre.description: Multicoloured beets from Étienne Côté, fresh goat cheese from Ferme Tournevent, spruce-bud syrup foraged in May.
beets-chevre.alt: Editorial vertical photograph of roasted beets in purple, golden and white, fanned on a stoneware plate with shavings of fresh goat cheese on top

tomme-saison.name: Kamouraska tomme, buckwheat honey, dark bread
tomme-saison.description: Six-month-aged farmhouse tomme, buckwheat-flower honey, sourdough dark bread baked each morning.
tomme-saison.alt: Vertical photograph of a rustic wedge of tomme cheese, served with a drizzle of amber honey and a slice of cracked dark sourdough

omble-chevalier.name: Arctic char, sea beans, ice-cider beurre blanc
omble-chevalier.description: Arctic char from the Saguenay fjord, sea beans foraged at low tide, ice-cider beurre blanc.
omble-chevalier.alt: Vertical photograph of a pink pearlescent arctic char fillet, garnished with fresh green sea beans, napped with a creamy beurre blanc on a white plate

agneau-charlevoix.name: Charlevoix lamb, sunchoke, wild thyme
agneau-charlevoix.description: Eight-hour-braised lamb shoulder, sunchoke purée, wild thyme dried in the farm's attic.
agneau-charlevoix.alt: Vertical photograph of a slice of braised lamb shoulder, deep mahogany colour, on a bed of golden sunchoke purée, sprig of thyme for garnish

tarte-poireaux.name: Leek tart, trout broth, quail egg
tarte-poireaux.description: Four-hour-confit leeks, butter-rich shortcrust, house-smoked trout broth, a runny quail-egg yolk.
tarte-poireaux.alt: Vertical photograph of a rectangular leek tart with soft-green confit leeks, topped with a glossy quail-egg yolk, amber broth around

sabayon-sureau.name: Elderflower sabayon, raspberries, buckwheat biscotti
sabayon-sureau.description: Warm wild-elderflower sabayon, summer black raspberries, buckwheat biscotti from Bas-Saint-Laurent.
sabayon-sureau.alt: Vertical photograph of a cream-coloured foamy sabayon in a wine glass, black raspberries and buckwheat biscotti set beside

tarte-argousier.name: Sea buckthorn tart, torched meringue
tarte-argousier.description: Fjord sea-buckthorn curd, almond shortcrust, Italian meringue torched at the pass.
tarte-argousier.alt: Vertical photograph of an individual orange-hued sea-buckthorn tart, crowned with golden meringue peaks caramelised on the tips

chocolat-sarrasin.name: 80% chocolate, buckwheat honey, hay-milk ice cream
chocolat-sarrasin.description: Manjari 80% chocolate fondant, buckwheat-honey ganache, hay-milk ice cream from last summer's drying.
chocolat-sarrasin.alt: Vertical photograph of a glossy dark-chocolate fondant, molten centre, served with a white quenelle of ice cream and a drizzle of buckwheat honey

reservation.title: Twenty seats. One menu. Five evenings a week.
reservation.subtitle: Reservations are taken by phone or email — no platform. Marguerite answers you herself within 24 hours. Please flag allergies or dietary restrictions: the kitchen always adapts.
reservation.trust_line: Wed–Sun · 5:30 to 10 pm · single dining room, non-smoking

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: La Table de Marguerite complies with Québec's Act 25 on the protection of personal information in the private sector.
privacy.data_body: Name, email, phone, dietary restrictions/allergies declared at reservation time.
privacy.purposes_body: Reservation management, menu adaptation for allergens, seasonal newsletter (separate opt-in), anonymized usage analytics.
privacy.retention_body: Reservations are kept for 24 months. Declared allergens are kept only during service and destroyed afterward. Navigation data is kept for 24 months maximum.
privacy.rights_body: You may request access, rectification or deletion of your data at any time by contacting our officer.

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.host_value: Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut, CA 91789, United States

cookies.banner_body: We use essential cookies to run the site. Analytics cookies are only enabled with your consent.
